title: Boeing vs Honeywell vs 3M: Which Dip Is the Best Buy Right Now?
summary: Boeing (NYSE: BA), Honeywell (NASDAQ: HON), and 3M (NYSE: MMM) have all pulled back sharply over the past month. Each just reported Q4 2025 earnings, and each tells a very different story about what “dip” actually means. title: 3M Goes Big On Fire Safety With $1.95 Billion Deal
summary: On Thursday, 3M Company said it has entered into an agreement to acquire Madison Fire & Rescue in partnership with Bain Capital, forming a new joint venture focused on safety and fire-rescue solutions. 3M and Bain Capital will acquire Madison Fire & Rescue from Madison Industries for $1.95 billion. As part of the deal, 3M will contribute its Scott Safety business to the joint venture. It will also receive $700 million in cash and hold a 50.1% stake, while Bain Capital will own 49.9%. title: 3M to create a leading fire and safety business; acquires Madison Fire & Rescue and combines with Scott Safety

title: 3M announces capacity investment for Expanded Beam Optical (EBO) production
